ksa_text: Knowledge of data pipeline monitoring and observability, including data freshness tracking, volume anomaly detection, schema change detection, job failure pattern analysis, and alerting system design.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-013 (DA, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4014 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.401, eu_ai_act=0.396, dcwf=0.392) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4014 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-K-013 (composite 0.4014) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4014 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Market Research Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.4014 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4014, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
